judge_reason: Description A claims specific visual elements (a greenish-blue paper document, a handwritten note) that Description B explicitly states are absent ('no photographs, sketches, or diagrams'), creating a direct contradiction on the presence of visual content.
original_image_tags: A greenish-blue paper document, a "First Indorsement" form. The text is typed. In the lower-left, there is a typed "1 Incl. n/c" followed by a handwritten note "
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten military memorandum page with multiple typed lines, a blue ink stamp, handwritten marginal notes, a “CONFIDENTIAL” marking near the bottom, and a boxed routing/office-symbology table at the lower edge.*
